specific_change.target: Implement predictive auto-scaling on compute (scale out at cpu_p95 > 65, max 14 instances). Add 2 read replicas with read/write splitting on database. Raise connection pool limit from 150 to 300.
specific_change.produced: Replace step scaling with predictive auto-scaling on the compute ASG (trigger scale-out at cpu_p95 > 65%, raise max_size from 12 to 14), add 2 read replicas (db.r6g.xlarge) with read/write splitting t
